articles.title: Haryana’s cotton farms holding on by a thread
articles.description: The Bt cotton revolution of the early 2000s had farmers in Haryana’s Hisar, Sirsa, Fatehabad, and Jind reaping rewards. Now, the pink bollworm is slashing yields and squeezing profits and the MSP is not enough. As farmers ditch cotton for paddy, the impact is soon likely to be felt by farm labourers, traders, and the economy as a whole, reports Ashok Kumar

topStories.title: Iran claims mobilisation of over 1 million fighters amid fears of US ground conflict
topStories.description: The development comes amid escalating tensions in the region and growing speculation over a possible US military move on Iran’s southern front, particularly around the strategically critical Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump signature to appear on all new US currency in historic shift
dailyNews.description: Trump signature to appear on all new US currency in historic shift

dailyNews.title: Why Iraq is the most fragile front in the US-Israel war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Iraq is under attack from all sides as militias and foreign powers clash.

dailyNews.title: What are the red lines for Iran and the US in the war?
dailyNews.description: Tehran says US list of 15 demands does not reflect reality.

dailyNews.title: Trump postpones US strikes on Iranian power grid to April 6 amid talks
dailyNews.description: The US president has threatened the attacks as a means of pressuring Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway.

dailyNews.title: Al Jazeera visits Iran’s UNESCO-listed palace damaged by war
dailyNews.description: Al Jazeera visited Tehran's UNESCO-listed Golestan Palace, which Iran says was damaged by US-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: Trump delays strikes on Iranian power plants by 10 days, says talks are ‘going very well’
dailyNews.description: “Talks aimed at ending the conflict are going very well,” Trump said, explaining his decision to delay potential military action.

dailyNews.title: Protests erupt outside US court over Maduro case
dailyNews.description: Supporters and opponents of Nicolas Maduro gathered outside a New York court.

dailyNews.title: "Talks Going Well": Trump Extends Pause On Iran Power Plant Strikes
dailyNews.description: Iran War Live News: Trump Pauses Strikes On Energy Plants In Iran For 10 Days

dailyNews.title: Iran in driver seat, Trump's only option is to throw all he has: Top US official
dailyNews.description: Iran in driver seat Trumps only option is to throw all he has Top US official

dailyNews.title: US judge weighs Trump decision to bar Venezuelan funds for Maduro’s defence
dailyNews.description: Judge Hellerstein declined to dismiss the case against Maduro but questioned US prosecutors about his access to defence.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran ‘begging’ for deal to end war as Tehran issues new demands
dailyNews.description: Trump says US, Israel wiped out navy and air force, as Iran lawmakers plan to collect tolls for transiting ships.

dailyNews.title: Zelensky visits Saudi Arabia after offering Ukraine's drone expertise
dailyNews.description: There is renewed urgency for Ukraine to get a drone deal done, as the US increasingly focuses on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Data centers get ready — the Senate wants to see your power bills
dailyNews.description: Sens. Josh Hawley and Elizabeth Warren want the Energy Information Administration to gather more details about how data centers use power — and how that affects the grid.

dailyNews.title: Mizoram's Lalduhoma Demolishes Youth Congress's Land Deals Allegations
dailyNews.description: Mizoram Chief Minister Lalduhoma slammed the Youth Congress for making baseless allegations on land purchase

dailyNews.title: Defense startup Shield AI lands $12.7B valuation, up 140%, after U.S. Air Force deal
dailyNews.description: In one year, Shield AI's value has leaped 140%. This after it won a contract to be the software provider to Anduril's Fury fighter jet for the U.S. Air Force.

dailyNews.title: Iran Mobilises 1 Million Fighters For Possible US Ground Invasion: Report
dailyNews.description: Despite claims from Donald Trump that negotiations are underway, Tehran has publicly rejected any diplomatic approach from Washington.

dailyNews.title: '10 Oil Tankers Through Hormuz': Trump Reveals Iran's 'Present' To US
dailyNews.description: Trump made the comments at a Cabinet meeting in the White House, elaborating on what he had previously described as a "present" from Iran.

dailyNews.title: "We Trust US Legal System": Maduro's Son Ahead Of 2nd Hearing
dailyNews.description: Ousted Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro's son, whose father faces a second hearing before a New York court Thursday, told AFP he trusts the US legal system but that the case was tainted by his...

dailyNews.title: A "Lousy Fighters" Jibe From Trump As Iran Calls US Proposal "One-Sided"
dailyNews.description: Earlier in the day, in a post on Truth Social, Trump claimed that Iran had been "begging" for a deal but has publicly maintained that they are just "looking at our proposal".

dailyNews.title: From backing National Guard role to Powell ‘attack’: Key takeaways from Trump’s cabinet meeting
dailyNews.description: The remarks come as Trump faces legal challenges, economic pressures from rising energy prices, and political battles over immigration and federal authority, underscoring a combative tone ahead of key political contests.

dailyNews.title: Iran's IRGC Navy Commander Leading Closure Of Hormuz Eliminated: Netanyahu
dailyNews.description: He described the operation as 'yet another example of the cooperation between us and our ally, the United States, in pursuit of our shared war objectives'.

dailyNews.title: 'Injection for Pedophiles': Iran Embassy Links War With Epstein Files Row
dailyNews.description: Iran amplifies Epstein-linked narratives as it rejects a US peace plan as "one-sided," while Trump warns Tehran to strike a deal or face continued military pressure.

dailyNews.title: Treasury to place Trump’s signature on paper currency to mark US 250th anniversary
dailyNews.description: Trump's signature will appear on U.S. dollar bills, the Treasury said, marking the first time in 165 years a president's name will appear on currency.

dailyNews.title: Fox News Poll: Sour voters say Washington is out of touch
dailyNews.description: A new national poll finds Trump's disapproval hits a second-term high of 59%, and his inflation approval dropped to 28% as voter pessimism grows.

dailyNews.title: Trump pauses Iran energy plant strikes for 10 days as talks ‘going very well’
dailyNews.description: President paused planned Iran energy plant strikes for 10 days, citing ongoing talks and setting a new April 6 deadline as Operation Epic Fury continues.

dailyNews.title: G.O.P. Senator Weighs Forcing Congress to Vote to Authorize the Iran War
dailyNews.description: Senator Lisa Murkowski of Alaska is drafting a formal authorization for the use of military force in Iran, seeking to put some parameters around the operation as the Trump administration has boxed out Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Begins Investigations Into Three Medical Schools
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department’s demands for admissions-related data from Stanford, Ohio State and the University of California, San Diego, represent a flex of federal power.

dailyNews.title: Trump Eyes White House Treaty Room for Latest Renovation Project
dailyNews.description: President Trump is making new plans in one of the most significant renovations in the history of the White House.

dailyNews.title: Trump Defends His Use of Mail-In Voting: ‘Because I’m President’
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to restrict voting by mail, which he says amounts to “cheating.” But he defended his own use of the practice in a special election this week.

dailyNews.title: Trump's signature to be featured on U.S. paper currency, Treasury says
dailyNews.description: The Treasury Department plans to add President Trump's signature to new U.S. paper currency, a first for a sitting president.

dailyNews.title: Chris Sununu says "we are disincentivizing" people from joining airline industry
dailyNews.description: President Trump is urging Republicans to move forward with a bill to end the partial government shutdown without support from Democrats to get airport security lines moving. Shawna Mizelle reports from George Bush Intercontinental Airport in Houston. Then, Chris Sununu, president and CEO of Airlines for America, joins "The Daily Report" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Democrats weigh "final" GOP offer to end DHS shutdown, Trump vows to restart TSA pay
dailyNews.description: Democrats say they are considering Republicans' "last and final" offer to end the DHS shutdown. Follow live updates.

dailyNews.title: Trump pushes back deadline for Iran to open Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump is pushing back his ultimatum, at Iran's request, for the country to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, or face U.S. strikes on its power plants. It comes as the president said negotiations are underway, even as thousands of troops head to the Middle East. CBS News' Holly Williams and Zak Hudak report.
